image:image.image:title: Freemium Services — 20,000+ Open-Source Tools Directory
image:image.image:caption: The world's largest verified directory of freemium and open-source tools with self-hosting guides and TurboQuant DePIN deployment

image:image.image:title: n8n — Open-Source Workflow Automation Tool
image:image.image:caption: n8n fair-code workflow automation with 400+ integrations, self-hostable, and AI agent builder

image:image.image:title: Ollama — Run LLMs Locally
image:image.image:caption: Ollama runs Llama 3.3, Mistral, DeepSeek-R1 and 150+ models locally with a single command

image:image.image:title: Qdrant — High-Performance Vector Database
image:image.image:caption: Qdrant is the fastest self-hostable vector database for RAG pipelines and semantic search

image:image.image:title: Dify — Open-Source LLM App Platform
image:image.image:caption: Dify LLMOps platform for building RAG pipelines and AI agents with visual workflows

image:image.image:title: Coolify — Self-Hosted Heroku Alternative
image:image.image:caption: Coolify open-source PaaS for deploying apps, databases, and services with auto-SSL

image:image.image:title: Best AI Tools 2026 — Freemium Services
image:image.image:caption: 240+ verified AI tools including LLMs, image generators, coding assistants and agents

image:image.image:title: Best Self-Hosting Tools 2026 — Freemium Services
image:image.image:caption: 320+ self-hostable applications for data sovereignty, privacy, and cost reduction
